reach_why: Extends known model-bias concerns to ontology reconstruction, but does not open wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links fallibilist underdetermination, ontology choice, and graph extraction failure in historical reasoning reconstruction.
falsifiable_why: Compare outputs across ontologies, prompts, and domains; test whether imposed graph structure varies systematically.
explanation: Graph extraction may project the model’s ontology onto texts, misreconstructing causal reasoning under ontological uncertainty.
